description_long: This object depicts a modern residential development consisting of three distinct houses, each set within its own fenced plot and separated by a central access road. The houses feature flat roofs, large glass windows, and clean geometric lines, characteristic of contemporary architectural design. Each property includes landscaped green lawns, paved driveways, and private outdoor spaces, with some houses featuring visible swimming pools. The arrangement of the houses is linear, with the central house being the largest and most complex, while the two flanking houses are slightly smaller but similarly styled. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of white plaster, glass, and metal, with minimalistic landscaping and boundary walls. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood with a focus on privacy and modern aesthetics.
description: A set of three modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, private yards, and minimalist landscaping, arranged along a central road in a fenced residential development.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the development from above and behind, highlighting the rear yards, swimming pools, and the linear arrangement of the houses along the central road.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a frontal perspective, displaying the main facades, entryways, and the central access road dividing the properties.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side angle, emphasizing the depth of the plots, the boundary walls, and the spatial separation between the houses.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a street-level approach, focusing on the front lawns, driveways, and the main entrances of the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryways with flat doors, small steps, and no prominent overhangs or columns
